entries.title: Live Stock Market Dashboard
entries.description: Develops a comprehensive stock dashboard, designed to provide users with real-time stock data and technical analysis.
entries.situation: The increasing complexity of financial markets necessitates intuitive tools for individual investors and analysts to monitor stock performance and identify trends. Existing tools suffer from cluttered interfaces, lack of real-time integration, and limited customization for technical indicators.

entries.title: Option Pricing Analytics
entries.description: Delivers platform for options pricing, Greeks analysis, and risk management, offering an intuitive interface for financial derivatives analysis.
entries.situation: Options trading requires simultaneous understanding of multiple Greek metrics and pricing models. Existing platforms either overwhelm users with raw data or oversimplify the underlying mathematics, leaving a gap for professional-grade yet intuitive analytics.

entries.title: Business Valuation Simulator
entries.description: Develops a business valuation tool that calculates the enterprise value of a company based on various parameters like revenue, assets, growth rate, and margin.
entries.situation: Accurate business valuation is critical for investment decisions but typically requires expensive financial software or manual spreadsheet modeling. A gap exists for an accessible, interactive simulator that applies industry-standard methodologies with real-time sensitivity analysis.
